sub_pixel_system.notes: Game uses vector-based art and animations; sub-pixel precision not documented

special_mechanics.name: Laser Pistol
special_mechanics.description: Three-mode weapon acquired mid-game: standard fire, force field creation (defensive), and charged shot (breaks force fields and walls)

special_mechanics.name: Swimming
special_mechanics.description: Swimming sequences with oxygen bar mechanic; player must manage oxygen during underwater sections

special_mechanics.name: Interaction-Based Puzzles
special_mechanics.description: Situation-specific actions including rocking cages; environmental hazard avoidance

special_mechanics.name: One-Hit Death Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Lester and alien ally cannot sustain any damage; game ends if struck by projectile, enemy contact, or hazard contact

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative data. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics but does not document numerical physics parameters. Game designed with vector animations and rotoscoping for character movement planning. No technical movement data (acceleration, gravity, jump values) found in available sources.
